history.what_changed: Built the initial gitmind pipeline: diff reader, Ollama LLM analyzer, metadata writer, CLI query tool, and install hook.
history.why_it_likely_changed: Project inception — needed a working end-to-end proof of concept.
history.impact: Every git commit in an instrumented repo now triggers semantic analysis automatically.

history.what_changed: Fixed the root commit edge case where git diff HEAD~1 HEAD fails with no parent, and added .gitignore to exclude the venv.
history.why_it_likely_changed: The initial commit had no HEAD~1 to diff against — the hook silently skipped it.
history.impact: gitmind now handles the very first commit in any repo using git show HEAD as a fallback.

history.what_changed: Added _extract_json() to strip markdown fences and _coerce() to fix wrong field types returned by the LLM.
history.why_it_likely_changed: deepseek-coder returned arrays where strings were expected and wrapped output in markdown code blocks.
history.impact: Parser now survives malformed LLM responses without crashing.

history.what_changed: Added format:json to the Ollama API request to constrain the model's output tokenizer to valid JSON only.
history.why_it_likely_changed: Without it, deepseek-coder appended // comments and trailing prose — both invalid JSON.
history.impact: First successful end-to-end run: hook fired, LLM analyzed diff, metadata written cleanly.

history.what_changed: Capped feature names at 4 words / 40 chars with underscore collapsing, and added the README with real test findings.
history.why_it_likely_changed: The model was generating 90-character feature names that were unreadable.
history.impact: Feature names are now short, readable snake_case identifiers.

history.what_changed: Added CI/CD workflows, MkDocs Material docs site, 12-test pytest suite, black formatting, CONTRIBUTING, CHANGELOG, LICENSE, and GitHub issue templates.
history.why_it_likely_changed: Needed the repo to look credible for open source release.
history.impact: Every PR now gets a CI check; docs auto-deploy to GitHub Pages on every push to main.

history.what_changed: Added contents:write permission and git config to allow the GitHub Actions bot to push to the gh-pages branch.
history.why_it_likely_changed: The docs workflow failed with a 403 — the bot lacked push permission.
history.impact: Docs now deploy successfully to GitHub Pages on every push to main.

history.what_changed: Added a hand-written build log doc capturing the full development story: every commit, what broke, and what gitmind said about itself.
history.why_it_likely_changed: New users landing on the repo needed to understand how the project evolved and that the tool was tested on itself.
history.impact: The Build Log page shows gitmind's own self-documented history.

history.what_changed: Wrapped LLM call in try/except so Ollama timeouts and connection errors print a one-liner instead of a 30-line traceback.
history.why_it_likely_changed: Ollama went idle between commits and the hook printed a full stack trace into the terminal.
history.impact: Hook failures are now silent and non-blocking — the commit still succeeds.

history.what_changed: Removed .gitmind/ from git tracking, added large-diff chunking, enforced 4-word feature name limit, and filtered hallucinated file paths from LLM output.
history.why_it_likely_changed: Four distinct quality issues identified: .gitmind committed, bad feature names, LLM overwhelmed by large diffs, fake paths like actions/checkout@v4 in files_touched.
history.impact: Metadata is now cleaner, .gitmind/ is local-only, and large commits get summarised by file list instead of raw diff.

history.what_changed: Added scripts/generate_build_log.py which reads metadata.json and generates docs/build-log.md automatically on every push via docs.yml.
history.why_it_likely_changed: The hand-written build log would go stale — needed it to update from real metadata on every deploy.
history.impact: The Build Log page on the docs site now reflects live metadata on every push.

history.what_changed: Added GITMIND_RUNNING env var guard to post-commit hook to prevent the metadata amend from triggering the hook again infinitely.
history.why_it_likely_changed: --no-verify skips pre-commit and commit-msg hooks but not post-commit, causing an infinite amend loop.
history.impact: Hook now runs exactly once per commit. metadata.json is included in the same commit automatically.

history.what_changed: Pinned black==25.1.0 in CI and added pyproject.toml with target-version=py39 to get consistent formatting across Python versions.
history.why_it_likely_changed: CI was installing the latest black which produced different output than local Python 3.9, causing repeated check failures.
history.impact: CI black check is now deterministic — same output on Python 3.9 locally and Python 3.11 in CI.

history.what_changed: The tool has been updated to improve build log generation and document its own development.
The tool has been updated to improve build log generation and document its own development.
history.impact: One sentence string on the impact of changing how json data is handled for tasks or similar actions more efficiently, particularly when used as a means to generate semantic metadata.
